title: Automation
scope: Home Assistant bridge: check sensors, control smart-home devices, manage human-friendly aliases, list services, and find low batteries — by talking to the configured Home Assistant REST API. NOT user prompt rules (the Behaviors app); this drives real smart-home entities.

specs.title: Find a device
specs.behavior: Finding a device locates a Home Assistant DEVICE by friendly name or alias and lists its entities.

specs.title: Resolve an entity
specs.behavior: Resolving maps a human name or alias to the best matching Home Assistant entity.

specs.title: List entities
specs.behavior: Listing returns Home Assistant entities, optionally filtered by domain or search text.

specs.title: Get entity state
specs.behavior: Getting returns the current state and attributes for a Home Assistant entity or alias.

specs.title: List aliases
specs.behavior: Listing returns saved human aliases for Home Assistant entities.

specs.title: Add an alias
specs.behavior: Adding saves a human-friendly alias for a Home Assistant entity.

specs.title: Delete an alias
specs.behavior: Deleting removes a saved Home Assistant alias.

specs.title: Turn on/off/toggle a device
specs.behavior: Switching turns a controllable Home Assistant entity (or alias) on, off, or toggles it.

specs.title: Set a light
specs.behavior: Setting a light adjusts its brightness and/or color by entity id or alias.

specs.title: Call a service
specs.behavior: Calling invokes any Home Assistant service with parameters.

specs.title: List services
specs.behavior: Listing returns Home Assistant service domains and their services.

specs.title: Test the connection
specs.behavior: Testing checks whether the configured Home Assistant REST API is reachable.

specs.title: Find low batteries
specs.behavior: Low-battery search finds Home Assistant battery sensors that are low or need replacement.
